posts.title: eks-manifest-app-in-diff-arch
posts.text: reference docker manifest link The docker manifest command by itself performs no action. In order to operate on a manifest or manifest list, one of the subcommands must be used. A single manifest is information about an image, such as layers, size, and digest. The docker manifest command also gives users additional information such as the os and architecture an image was built for. A manifest list is a list of image layers that is created by specifying one or more (ideally more than one) image names. It can then be used in the same way as an image name in docker pull and docker run commands, for example. Ideally a manifest list is created from images that are identical in function for different os/arch combinations. For this reason, manifest lists are often referred to as “multi-arch images”. However, a user could create a manifest list that points to two images – one for windows on amd64, and one for darwin on amd64. 为了在不同的架构ARM64/ AMD64中可以不指定docker image 名称, 可以用同名的方式来使用docker image。因此使用docker manifest 实现此功能 依照reference 示范github 中下载app 测试 git clone https://github.com/jlbutler/yahw.git && cd yahw make all docker images hello 在ECR 中建立hello, 并且登入ECR 123aws ecr get-login-password --region ${AWS_REGION} | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin \${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_REGION}.amazonaws.com/hello 将docker image 打上tag 123docker tag hello:arm64 ${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn/hello:arm64docker tag hello:arm64 ${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn/hello:amd64 可用 docker images | grep hello确认目前系统中的images docker push 将image 推上ECR 123docker push ${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn/hello:arm64docker push ${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn/hello:amd64 验证ECR中images aws ecr --region ${AWS_REGION} describe-images --repository-name hello 建立docker manifest 123docker manifest create ${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_REGION}.amazonaws.com.cn/hello \${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_REGION}.amazonaws.com.cn/hello:amd64 \${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_REGION}.amazonaws.com.cn/hello:arm64 确认manifest 设定docker manifest inspect ${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_REGION}.amazonaws.com.cn/hello 如果需要修改, 可以在~/.docker/manifests 中找到manifest 档案进行修改 push manifest 到ECRdocker manifest push ${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.${AWS_REGION}.amazonaws.com.cn/hello 建立arm64/amd64 node group cluster 请参考reference 建立与apply hello-app& hello-lb yaml hello-app.yaml 12345678910111213141516171819apiVersion: apps/v1kind: Deploymentmetadata: name: hello-deploymentspec: selector: matchLabels: app: hello replicas: 2 template: metadata: labels: app: hello spec: containers: - name: hello image: ${AWS_ACCOUNT_ID}.dkr.ecr.cn-northwest-1.amazonaws.com.cn/hello:latest ports: - containerPort: 8080 hello-lb.yaml 123456789101112apiVersion: v1kind: Servicemetadata: name: hello-servicespec: type: LoadBalancer selector: app: hello ports: - protocol: TCP port: 80 targetPort: 8080 123kubectl apply -f hello-app.yamlkubectl apply -f hello-lb.yaml 创建CLB 后，针对CLB 地址进行curl

posts.title: 中国区 AWS EKS ARM64/AMD64 混搭Node
posts.text: reference 创建集群： eksctl create cluster --name eks-multi-arch --without-nodegroup --region=${AWS_REGION} 创建AMD64 node group 123456789eksctl create nodegroup \--cluster eks-multi-arch \--region cn-northwest-1 \--name x86-mng \--node-type m5.large \--nodes 1 \--nodes-min 1 \--nodes-max 3 \--managed 创建ARM64 node group 123456789$ eksctl create nodegroup \--cluster eks-multi-arch \--region cn-northwest-1 \--name graviton-mng \--node-type m6g.large \--nodes 1 \--nodes-min 1 \--nodes-max 3 \--managed 创建时若出现错误如果创建时提示以下错误信息： [✖] to create an ARM nodegroup kube-proxy, coredns and aws-node addons should be up to date. Please use eksctl utils update-coredns, eksctl utils update-kube-proxy and eksctl utils update-aws-node before proceeding. 运行以下命令更新默认的扩展： 12345eksctl utils update-coredns --cluster eks-multi-archeksctl utils update-kube-proxy --cluster eks-multi-arch --approveeksctl utils update-aws-node --cluster eks-multi-arch --approve 创建结果

posts.title: 在AWS EKS 中利用ingress 与loadbalancer 暴露ELB
posts.text: reference 在K8S下有不同方式可以创建不同AWS ELB类型针对ALB Ingress 是在K8S 中对外暴露服务的其中一个方式, 作为Cluster 的一个出入口，Ingress 可以实现使用相同IP 地址暴露多个服务 AWS ingress controller 支持以下模式 IP mode/ instance mode使用 alb.ingress.kubernetes.io/target-type 在ingress 中註明 instance mode: Ingress traffic starts from the ALB and reaches the NodePort opened for your service. Traffic is then routed to the pods within the cluster. ip mode: Ingress traffic starts from the ALB and reaches the pods within the cluster directly. To use this mode, the networking plugin for the Kubernetes cluster must use a secondary IP address on ENI as pod IP, also known as the AWS CNI plugin for Kubernetes. 针对NLB &CLB 在service 中如果设定为LoadBalancer ，预设将会创建CLB 但在K8S 1.15后，可以在annoation 中设定 service.beta.kubernetes.io/aws-load-balancer-type: nlb cloud-provide-aws 将2048 游戏 中设定 ALB ingress的 2048-ingress 与 2048-service 以以下设定替换后，可以用NLB 替代ALB

posts.title: 使用ingress controller 在AWS EKS 上建立2048游戏
posts.text: 利用ALB ingress controller 建立2048 游戏 创建EKS OIDC Provider eksctl utils associate-iam-oidc-provider --cluster=$CLUSTER_NAME --approve --region $AWS_REGION 创建所需要的IAM policy 中国区需要手动删除WAF 部份 中国区IAM policy 创建service account 12345678eksctl create iamserviceaccount \ --cluster=${CLUSTER_NAME} \ --namespace=kube-system \ --name=alb-ingress-controller \ --attach-policy-arn=${POLICY_NAME} \ --override-existing-serviceaccounts \ --approve 创建RBAC rbac-role.yaml kubectl apply -f rbac-role.yaml 创建ALB ingress controller alb-ingress-controller 在中国区需要加上- –feature-gates=waf=false,wafv2=false 去除WAF 功能 必须给予AKSK授权或使用其它方式授权 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556# Application Load Balancer (ALB) Ingress Controller Deployment Manifest.# This manifest details sensible defaults for deploying an ALB Ingress Controller.# GitHub: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/aws-alb-ingress-controllerapiVersion: apps/v1kind: Deploymentmetadata: labels: app.kubernetes.io/name: alb-ingress-controller name: alb-ingress-controller # Namespace the ALB Ingress Controller should run in. Does not impact which # namespaces it's able to resolve ingress resource for. For limiting ingress # namespace scope, see --watch-namespace. namespace: kube-systemspec: selector: matchLabels: app.kubernetes.io/name: alb-ingress-controller template: metadata: labels: app.kubernetes.io/name: alb-ingress-controller spec: containers: - name: alb-ingress-controller args: # Setting the ingress-class flag below ensures that only ingress resources with the # annotation kubernetes.io/ingress.class: "alb" are respected by the controller. You may # choose any class you'd like for this controller to respect. - --ingress-class=alb # REQUIRED # Name of your cluster. Used when naming resources created # by the ALB Ingress Controller, providing distinction between # clusters. - --cluster-name=$CLUSTERNAME # AWS VPC ID this ingress controller will use to create AWS resources. # If unspecified, it will be discovered from ec2metadata. - --aws-vpc-id=$VPC_ID - --aws-region=$AWS_REGION #for china region to disable WAF - --feature-gates=waf=false,wafv2=false # - --aws-max-retries=10 env: - name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID value: $ACCESS_KEY - name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY value: $SECRET_KEY # Repository location of the ALB Ingress Controller. image: docker.io/amazon/aws-alb-ingress-controller:v1.1.9 serviceAccountName: alb-ingress-controller 部署2048 game下载 2048 yaml 1234kubectl apply -f 2048-namespace.yamlkubectl apply -f 2048-deployment.yamlkubectl apply -f 2048-service.yamlkubectl apply -f 2048-ingress.yaml ingress yaml 内容 12345678910111213141516171819apiVersion: extensions/v1beta1kind: Ingressmetadata: name: "2048-ingress" namespace: "2048-game" annotations: kubernetes.io/ingress.class: alb alb.ingress.kubernetes.io/scheme: internet-facing #alb.ingress.kubernetes.io/target-type: ip labels: app: 2048-ingressspec: rules: - http: paths: - path: /* backend: serviceName: "service-2048" servicePort: 80 确认部署状况 kubectl get ingress/2048-ingress -n 2048-game 问题排查命令 kubectl logs your-alb-ingress-controller -n kube-system确认ingress controller 日志输出是否有错误报警 kubectl get endpoints -Akubectl get ingress/2048-ingress -n 2048-game确认是否成功部署资源

posts.title: AWS EKS PV 设定
posts.text: 在进行操作前依据以下文档安装EBS CSI driver依照中文版说明安装EBS CSI driver doc 安装csi driver 后 Storage Class - 管理员提供了一种描述他们提供的存储的“类”的方法。 不同的类可能映射到服务质量级别，或备份策略，或者由群集管理员确定的任意策略 storage class 范例 需要注意在type 部份注明EBS type 否则可能创建出 gp3等type 123456789kind: StorageClassapiVersion: storage.k8s.io/v1metadata: name: ebs-scparameters: fsType: ext4 type: gp2provisioner: ebs.csi.aws.comvolumeBindingMode: WaitForFirstConsumer PVC - Persistent Volume Claim 是用户实际的存储的请求PVC 范例在PVC 中指定access mode, 存储大小等 1234567891011apiVersion: v1kind: PersistentVolumeClaimmetadata: name: ebs-claimspec: accessModes: - ReadWriteOnce storageClassName: ebs-sc resources: requests: storage: 4Gi PV - Persistent Volume 依据PVC 已经建立成功的实际PV可以看到实际的vol-ID
